verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise Him in the sanctuary Praise Him in the mighty heavens Praise Him All the earth praise Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise Him in His awesome power Praise His greath and holy Name Praise Him The whole world praise Him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From the rising of the sun Let his praise be heard From the east to the west And the north to south

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Let everything that has breath Praise the Lord forever Let everything in my soul Praise the Lord :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Praise the Lord Praise the Lord
